test.name: External-site search request should route to search-external-sites
test.description: User asks to search Newspapers.com and Ancestry — non-FamilySearch repositories. search-full-text only searches FamilySearch's AI-transcribed document images via fulltext_search. Commercial sites have their own search systems and require URL construction rather than tool calls. search-external-sites is the right skill.

input.user_message: Search Newspapers.com and Ancestry for any Flynn family obituaries or news mentions in Schuylkill County, Pennsylvania between 1860 and 1910.

negative.explanation: The user is asking to search commercial sites (Newspapers.com, Ancestry) which are outside FamilySearch's full-text index. search-full-text only has access to FamilySearch's fulltext_search MCP tool — it cannot search external repositories. search-external-sites handles URL construction and capture for those sites.

judge_context: Should route to search-external-sites — Newspapers.com and Ancestry are not in FamilySearch's FTS coverage
Should NOT execute a fulltext_search call — the tool covers FamilySearch's AI-transcribed documents only
Should clearly explain that FTS does not cover the named sites, so the request belongs to a different skill
